fullOutput:
<path>/home/user/code/nix-common.nix</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: # Shared Nix configuration for shell.nix and flake.nix
2: #
3: # This file ensures both environments have identical packages, environment
4: # variables, and shell hooks. The flake.lock provides exact version pinning.
5: #
6: # Usage in flake.nix:
7: #   nixCommon = import ./nix-common.nix { inherit pkgs; };
8: #
9: # Usage in shell.nix:
10: #   nixCommon = import ./nix-common.nix { inherit pkgs; };
11: 
12: { pkgs }:
13: 
14: {
15:   NIX_CONFIG = "extra-experimental-features = nix-command flakes ca-derivations";
16: 
17:   # Native build inputs (tools)
18:   nativeBuildInputs = with pkgs; [
19:     nix
20:     home-manager
21:     git
22:     sops
23:     ssh-to-age
24:     gnupg
25:     age
26:   ];
27: 
28:   # Additional packages
29:   packages = [
30:     (pkgs.python3.withPackages (
31:       python-pkgs: with python-pkgs; [
32:         pydbus
33:         dbus-python
34:         pygobject3
35:         dbus-python
36:       ]
37:     ))
38:   ]
39:   ++ [
40:     pkgs.gobject-introspection
41:     pkgs.glib
42:   ];
43: 
44:   # Shared shell hook for both nix-shell and nix develop
45:   shellHook = ''
46:     # nix develop reconstructs PATH, losing HM session paths.
47:     # Restore them with correct priority: devshell → HM → system
48:     #
49:     # Uses $nativeBuildInputs/$buildInputs (set by nix) to identify
50:     # which PATH entries came from the devshell vs inherited system PATH.
51: 
52:     _devshell_only=""
53:     _system_only=""
54:     _remaining="$PATH"
55:     while [ -n "$_remaining" ]; do
56:       _entry="''${_remaining%%:*}"
57:       if [ "$_entry" = "$_remaining" ]; then
58:         _remaining=""
59:       else
60:         _remaining="''${_remaining#*:}"
61:       fi
62:       _matched=0
63:       for _pkg in $nativeBuildInputs $buildInputs; do
64:         case "$_entry" in
65:           "$_pkg"/*) _matched=1; break ;;
66:         esac
67:       done
68:       if [ "$_matched" = 1 ]; then
69:         _devshell_only="$_devshell_only''${_devshell_only:+:}$_entry"
70:       else
71:         _system_only="$_system_only''${_system_only:+:}$_entry"
72:       fi
73:     done
74: 
75:     # Source HM session vars (EDITOR, etc.) and extract HM PATH additions
76:     _pre_hm_path="$PATH"
77:     unset __HM_SESS_VARS_SOURCED
78:     . "$HOME/.profile" 2>/dev/null || true
79:     _hm_paths="''${PATH%:$_pre_hm_path}"
80:     if [ "$_hm_paths" = "$PATH" ]; then
81:       _hm_paths=""
82:     fi
83: 
84:     # Reconstruct PATH: devshell → HM → system
85:     export PATH="$_devshell_only''${_hm_paths:+:$_hm_paths}''${_system_only:+:$_system_only}"
86:     unset _devshell_only _system_only _remaining _entry _matched _pkg _pre_hm_path _hm_paths
87: 
88:     echo "Welcome to the development shell!"
89:   '';
90: }

(End of file - total 90 lines)
</content>
